title: Corrosion Inducement
wikitext:
[[File:F185DE85-6A61-45FC-BD82-B094B3B597D6.gif|thumb|320px|[[Destoroyah]] and the Oxygen Destroyer can dissolve others with micro-oxygen]]

==Summary==
'''Corrosion Inducement''' is the ability to corrode objects, generally on solids like rock or metal, at faster than natural rates. On biological objects or people, this is usually seen as a form of rapid decay. Corrosion generally causes the inflicted to slowly break down and weaken durability. It can also be seen as a subset ability of [[Acid Manipulation]], and rarely, [[Water Manipulation]] or [[Age Manipulation]].

==Notable Users==
* Crystallized [[Homura Akemi]] and the Satori [[Wraith (Puella Magi Madoka Magica)|Wraith]] ([[Puella Magi Verse|Puella Magi Madoka Magica: Wraith Arc]])
* Poison [[Kirby]] ([[Kirby (Series)|Kirby]])
* [[Illness Magic User]] ([[The Zashiki Warashi of Intellectual Village]])
* [[Bog]] ([[Rock Hard Gladiators]])
